U

update(CollegeBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent College entity row inside the database engine using its designated primary key.
update(CourseBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CourseModel
Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent Course entity row inside the database engine using its designated primary key.
update(FacultyBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent Faculty entity row inside the database engine.
update(MarksheetBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent Marksheet entity row inside the database engine.
update(RoleBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Updates an existing Role record in the database after validating for name duplicates.
update(StudentBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Updates an existing Student record in the database.
update(SubjectBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Updates an existing Subject record in the database and refreshes its course dependency metadata context.
update(TimetableBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Updates an existing Timetable record.
update(UserBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Updates an existing user record.
USER_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Context binding mapping the operational User data controller servlet.
USER_LIST_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Context binding mapping the User collection tracking manager servlet.
USER_LIST_VIEW - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Path definition tracking User search and list display tabular layout.
USER_REGISTRATION_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Context binding mapping the User Self-Registration processing servlet.
USER_REGISTRATION_VIEW - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Path definition tracking User Self-Registration layout.
USER_VIEW - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Path definition tracking User detailed profile CRUD view.
UserBean - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.bean
UserBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store user-related information such as personal details, login credentials, role information, and contact details.
UserBean() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.UserBean
 
UserCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
User functionality Controller.
UserCtl() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserCtl

User List functionality Controller.
UserListCtl() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserListCtl
 
UserModel - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.model
UserModel class handles all database operations related to User.

UserRegistrationCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
User Registration functionality Controller.
